app.title: Identity Journal
app.description: A space for self-reflection and identity exploration
intro.subtitle: A safe space to explore and document your journey
reflection.title: Your Gratitude Reflections
reflection.subtitle: These reflections are reminders of the strengths and experiences that shape who you are.
reflection.meaningful_question: Which reflection feels most meaningful today?
completion.title: Reflection Complete
completion.subtitle: Your gratitude reflects the many colors of who you are.
history.title: Past Journals
prompt_1: What part of your identity are you grateful for today?
hint_1_1: I'm grateful for my courage to live authentically.
hint_1_2: I'm grateful for the community that supports me.
hint_1_3: I'm grateful for the resilience I've developed.
prompt_2: What experience or journey helped shape who you are?
hint_2_1: My experiences helped me grow stronger.
hint_2_2: My journey helped me understand others better.
prompt_3: What strength in yourself are you grateful for?
auth.description: You must provide a valid token to access your Identity Journal.
auth.instructions: Please use a valid link with an access token or contact support if you believe this is an error.
